menu_options.ipmi: Lights-Out 100 (LO100) - plain IPMI, e.g. DL160/DL180 G6/G7

ilo.title: Connect to HPE iLO
ilo.description: Enter the iLO management address and credentials. Enable 'Legacy SSL' for older generations (e.g. iLO 3) that only support TLSv1.1/SSLv3.

ipmi.title: Connect to a Lights-Out 100 (LO100) board
ipmi.description: Enter the LO100 management address and credentials. LO100 is a plain IPMI 2.0 interface found on entry-level ProLiant "hundred series" servers (e.g. the DL160 G6) that never had a real iLO.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the host
